response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies; while they have some C++ exposure from 2014–2015, it's minimal and not sustained, and there's no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or mentoring experience in DevOps/cloud engineering.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Experience with distributed systems via GISCollective and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: Only 1–2 years of C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale infrastructure design
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams or architectural mentoring
